plugins.name: APC UPS Monitor
plugins.author: NekoShinobi
plugins.description: Monitor APC UPS status via apcupsd. Shows battery level, load, runtime, and other vital UPS information on the bar.

plugins.name: Yay Updater
plugins.author: NekoShinobi
plugins.description: Check for Arch Linux updates via yay every 4 hours and provides visual update count on the bar. Click to view package list and update.
